name: subfinder
title: subfinder
description:
subdomain discovery tool
This package contains a subdomain discovery tool that discovers valid
subdomains for websites by using passive online sources. It has a simple
modular architecture and is optimized for speed. subfinder is built for doing
one thing only - passive subdomain enumeration, and it does that very well.

commands.name: subfinder
commands.description: Subfinder is a subdomain discovery tool that discovers subdomains for websites by using passive online sources.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use subfinder because subdomain discovery tool.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use subfinder as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `subfinder [options] [args]` as documented upstream for subfinder.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair subfinder with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `subfinder --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
